title: MCP v1 hard-switch
checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/interface.test.ts tests/engine-contract.test.ts

stories.title: Lock explicit MCP v1 contract in specs
stories.notes: Implement Task 1 Step 2 from specs/implementation/mcp-v1-hard-switch-plan.md. Update specs/raw/astrograph_jcodemunch_agent_spec.md, specs/api-design/mcp-tools.md, specs/architecture/adrs.md if needed, specs/implementation/README.md, and specs/README.md so they consistently document: query_code removed from MCP v1, explicit tools search_symbols/get_symbol_source/get_context_bundle/get_ranked_context, strict envelope ok/data/meta/error, toolVersion 1 registration metadata, no MCP cache behavior, and tree-sitter-only parser decision already recorded as ADR-004. Mark only the relevant completed plan checkbox when done.

stories.title: Register explicit MCP v1 retrieval tools and remove query_code from MCP
stories.notes: Implement Task 2 from specs/implementation/mcp-v1-hard-switch-plan.md. Remove query_code from MCP_TOOL_DEFINITIONS only; preserve non-MCP queryCode export. Add strict MCP registrations for search_symbols, get_symbol_source, get_context_bundle, get_ranked_context. Align config/type/tool lists and install docs. Do not implement response envelopes in this story unless needed for type shape.

stories.title: Enforce strict MCP v1 response envelopes
stories.notes: Implement Task 3 from specs/implementation/mcp-v1-hard-switch-plan.md. Dispatch must return success and error envelopes with ok, data, meta, error where appropriate. Move token estimate/freshness metadata into envelope meta. Normalize thrown errors. Add focused tests.

stories.title: Lock MCP v1 tests and parser metadata assertions
stories.notes: Implement Task 4 from specs/implementation/mcp-v1-hard-switch-plan.md. Update interface and contract tests for no query_code in MCP, new explicit tools, envelope success/error paths, token/freshness metadata, and tree-sitter-only parser metadata.

stories.title: Release hardening and final rollout checks
stories.notes: Implement Task 5 from specs/implementation/mcp-v1-hard-switch-plan.md after earlier stories pass. Run required checks, update plan checkboxes, run version policy, and prepare final commit checkpoint.
